pages.text: An $(term)Essence Reaction$() lets two metals react directly and change state according to their relationship. Its catalyst is a Transmutation Crystal.

pages.title: The Catalyst
pages.text: Drop a crystal into the catalyst slot. The crucible HUD displays two essence slots. Fill both with essence metals; the reaction begins automatically.

pages.title: Reaction Results
pages.text: $(li)A restrains B: A +1, B -1.$(li)A doubly restrains B: A +2, B -2.$(li)Symbiosis: both +1.$(li)Mutual restraint: both -1.$(li)Neutral: neither changes.$(br2)Right-click afterward to collect both products.

pages.title: State, Not Identity
pages.text: The products remain the same essence metals; only their states change. Crossing below Nigredo or above Citrinitas still destroys the essence.

pages.title: Useful Controls
pages.text: Hold a storage box and right-click the crucible to insert its selected essence. Scroll to change the box selection.$(br2)Before a reaction starts, or while it is in progress, Shift-right-click with an empty hand to recover materials and the catalyst.
